Comfortable Accommodation: An der Bremke in Herzberg am Harz offers a one-bedroom apartment with a living room. The property features a balcony, terrace, and garden, providing relaxing outdoor spaces.
Modern Facilities: Guests enjoy a fitness centre, sun terrace, and free WiFi. Additional amenities include a hot tub, sauna, and outdoor fireplace, ensuring a comfortable and enjoyable stay.
Convenient Location: Located 20 km from Harz National Park and 98 km from Kassel-Calden Airport, the apartment is close to attractions such as the University of GГѓВ¶ttingen and Imperial Palace. Free on-site private parking is available.
Guest Favorites: Visitors appreciate the well-equipped kitchen, excellent hiking opportunities, and attentive host.
